notes: Tested root and nested-page navigation prefixes.
Applied twice to verify no duplicate navigation, home card, workflow callout, or search entry.
Validated local links and fragments after both applications.
Verified generated checksum manifest includes the patch verification records.

truth_boundary: This verification covers the documentation overlay, patch script behavior, local-link validation, idempotency, and archive integrity on a representative static-site fixture. It does not re-run the x86decomp toolkit parser, sealed release tests, or external adapters, and it is not a visual cross-browser audit.
